reviews.title: Not recommended
reviews.text:
This hotel is disappointing in many aspects. I would like to list some points for other guests to consider:

- If you're not aware, the hotel has two locations near each other, but they use the same name for bookings. So be sure to check carefully before you go (when I checked in, there were several guests who misunderstood and ended up staying at a different location from the one they wanted).

Since we were also among the guests who ended up at the wrong hotel, we intended to use the hotel’s shuttle service to go to another facility, which was supposed to depart at 5:00 PM. We arrived at 4:50 PM to wait, but the staff informed us that there were no more shuttle services because the vehicle had already left to take other guests earlier.
- The staff was very slow in bringing up the luggage. I called multiple times, but no one answered, so I had to go down to notify them myself.
- The room didn't have slippers
- There were a lot of mosquitoes at night.
- I am one of those who have never left a negative review for any hotel or service, but this place is the worst hotel I’ve ever stayed at.

1st of all need ti say that we booked this hotel due to we saw in the hotel ads that its location is beside the beach but..unfortunately it s so far from the beach and the staff told us if you would go to the beach you need to go by hotel shuttle bus!! Hotel should amend their hotel’s information that they have 2 sides otherwise none know (just the text “garden wing and ocean wing not make sense enough” . 

Another big reason we will not come back again is there was a cockroach in our room!!! OMG and it s still alive walking on the floor near the bed. Let s imagine you pay your money to stay with cockroach!! I knew that it may come from water pipe ….(as staff mentioned when i went down) but how come the hotel under “accor” has a cockroach when it s 4star >> you should get only 2 stars instead. 

The best thing here is spa is nice and staff try to help but i think they are too junior to decide. When we stayed at 4-5 stars hotel and there were something uncontrollable, they will act more professional than here for example IHG group (they upgraded us not like here move us to lower level 🤣) You can do something better than move us to lower level and FOC for breakfast. 

No see you again Mercure rayong

reviews.title: Hygiene Issues: Reused Slippers and Unclean Bathroom
reviews.text:
The slippers provided in the room were already used by previous guests. The front manager has confirmed that the hotel reuses slippers as a new policy. I was given the new pairs after the complaints.  

In addition, I found multiple strands of hair in the bathroom, which clearly indicated that the room had not been properly cleaned before my arrival. 

These issues significantly affected my confidence in the hotel’s cleanliness standards. 

In addition to cleanliness standard of the hotel, if you choose to stay on ocean wing, the parking is so limited.  You need to park at another building which is 400-500 metre away. 

This is not what I would expect from a hotel at this level, and I would not recommend staying here.

I explained that this was not what I had booked, and was met with a Begrudging attitude, and told no Double rooms were available until next day, So I explained I was going to ring the agency I booked through, and Lo and behold, a room became available.
The resort is very nicely placed, and the rooms were OK, but starting to look a bit old and shabby now.
Overall the hotel reception staff were not pleasant, but the Restaurant staff were, as too were the maid service.
Nice swimming pool.
Restaurant food was OK, but Breakfast was a bit limited, although they did cook me a good portion of bacon when requested.
Would return, but only if the price was cheaper.

reviews.title: Good vibes, but disappointed with the room view
reviews.text:
The hotel has a great location with a relaxing atmosphere, perfect for a getaway. The pool is large and suitable for families. The room design is nice, and the bathroom is well planned with non-slip tiles and separate wet and dry areas.

I booked the room through Agoda for a 2-night stay, but the view was disappointing — showing only the roof of the lounge bar and some large equipment. A garden view would be a better alternative when sea or pool views are unavailable. Soundproofing could also be improved, as door noises from other rooms were quite noticeable.

Breakfast was good with a nice variety. Overall, a pleasant stay with room for improvement.

reviews.title: Be careful which wing you book
reviews.positives: Brand new hotel in a great condition, next to the beach. Our room was very nice and well furnished. The staff were amazing.
reviews.negatives:
The listing shows photos of a beachfront pool, but the truth is the pool is in another hotel, which is fraudulently called a different wing (called the ocean wing and we stayed at the garden wing). It’s not a wing if you have to take a shuttle bus using a public road to get there. It’s an entirely new property. The breakfast is also in that other “wing” and the shuttle bus runs every 30 minutes, which was a huge letdown and made our stay at the hotel much worse and less enjoyable than it otherwise would be. 

The TV wasn’t a smart tv making it impossible to watch Netflix. 

The rooftop bar looks great and has an amazing view, but the food menu is tiny and consists mainly of dishes I would consider appetizers. Don’t expect to have a dinner there.

reviews.title: Not recommended despite good location
reviews.text:
I was very disappointed with my 2-day, 1-night stay here.

Firstly, I assumed the Garden Wing and Ocean Wing were in the same area, but the Ocean Wing is actually located across the road, nearly 900 meters to 1 kilometer away. I chose this hotel specifically for the breakfast by the ocean, so this was quite disappointing. While the hotel mentions this in the property information, there’s no clear map or direct communication to explain that the wings are on separate properties.

Secondly, the breakfast was underwhelming. The omelette was overcooked, and the eggs Benedict was poorly prepared. Not worth the money.

Lastly, water was not provided initially, and I had to call reception to request it.

reviews.title: Best hotel in Mae Pim but need some improvement

reviews.negatives: Night-shift reception staff was bit impolite when answering maybe he was so tired, but his advice was a kind of insulting people. Others staffs such as domestic helpers, technician are so nicely trained and very helpfully good. Location is ok. Parking lot design is bit narrowly inconvenient need to walk far from reception about 200-400m depends on the parking point especially when get back late, have to walk so far. From beach-side restaurants at hotel front to reception is far but acceptable.

reviews.title: Suite that turned out to be a room
reviews.text: I booked a 77m2 suite to celebrate a special occasion, we were given a 36m2 room. When raising this point with the receptionist, I was informed that the hotel state this "Deluxe Suite" is 56 m2. Not wanting to spoil the holiday further, I decided to raise the point via Agoda, who passed it on to the hotel who ignored it. I ended up paying ***+ thb/ night for a regular size room that was marketed as a Suite. Reader will make their own conclusions before booking here. The hotel offered no explanation, compensation or refund when I write this review 2 weeks after check out. In my opinion it is a shame to use this cheat to overcharge customers as the hotel itself is great, but that is overshadowed by this sour experience. I left the hotel feeling cheated.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite Ocean View - Ocean Wing

reviews.title: Spacious Hotel with Great Facilities but Needs Urgent Updates
reviews.text:
The hotel itself is quite nice, with good facilities and a spacious, aesthetically pleasing appearance. The room I stayed in was very large and had plenty of space, which I appreciated.

However, the room felt quite outdated, and the bed was a major disappointment. It was extremely uncomfortable—flat and worn out to the point that I experienced backaches throughout my stay. This is far below the standard I expect from a Marriott property. I strongly urge management to replace the mattresses as soon as possible.

Another issue was the noise. Despite the room being big, the soundproofing was inadequate. I could hear noises from the hallway very clearly, which was disruptive at times.

Overall, the hotel has potential, but the outdated room and poor bed quality significantly detracted from my experience. Addressing these issues could make a big differenc

reviews.title: Dual Hotel
reviews.text: Be careful when you book. The online presence isn't honest in that there are two very separate hotels here. One is the 'Ocean Wing' which is on the beach, while one is completely separate and almost 1km down the road and away from the beach. When I booked, I didn't mind paying the cheaper rate, but didn't expect the  actual buildings to be nowhere near the beach. The listing suggests its one location, but it's not. And breakfast is only available in the 'Ocean Wing' so you have to trek for it. The peasant Wing isn't actually bad and has a lovely pool and rooftop, but just beware of what you think you're booking before you pay.

reviews.title: Lovely stay on the beach
reviews.positives: We had a wonderful stay at the Mercure hotel. We loved the beachfront location - so nice to be able to lay out by the pool with an immediate view of the beach and choose to go for a dip in the pool or the ocean. I loved hearing the sound of the waves all day too. So relaxing. Plenty of places to sit around the pool/by the beach, with a bar/restaurant nearby serving all day. Short walk to restaurants and basic shops down the road. It is a bit expensive for the area but it was a really nice stay for a few days.

reviews.title: The staffs’ attitude toward people of color…
reviews.text:
Everything about the facility, the location, the food, the decoration was great, but the staffs’ attitude and behavior toward people of color ruined everything for us.
One of the staff refused to service my husband (a man of color), but had no problems when the same request was asked by white customers. I reported the incident to front office staffs and they apologized to him. The duty manager also came later and tried to make the situation better. However, she only talked to me and apologized to me the whole time, and didn’t even look at my husband or tried talking to him  directly. We have been traveling the world and this is the first time this kind of incident happed to us. As a Thai citizen myself, I feel both angry and ashamed. I hope there will provide more training to the staffs so they know how to treat people equally. Also, I hope no future customers would encounter this kind of incident.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Very disappointed with my stay at Mercure Rayong Lomtalay Villas & Resort.

I booked my room almost 1 month in advance on April 25 for a stay on May 26. I specifically reserved the “Junior Suite Double Ocean View with Balcony – Garden Wing,” which was clearly advertised as an ocean view room.

However, upon arrival, I was assigned a corner room on the 2nd floor with barely any ocean view at all. The actual room experience was very different from what was shown and promised during booking.

The hotel explained that there was a large seminar group staying at the property and the rooms were fully occupied, so they could not provide the room type/view as booked. As compensation, they only offered a drink voucher as an apology.

Honestly, I was very confused and frustrated. If I booked almost a month ahead, shouldn’t the hotel management be able to allocate rooms properly for guests who reserved early?

Also, offering extra amenities or drink vouchers does not solve the issue for me at all. What I wanted was the ocean view — not additional perks or compensation items. I already have all the usual conveniences at home.

The entire reason I chose this room type and paid extra was because I wanted to relax, work comfortably, and enjoy a beautiful sea view at the same time. That was the main purpose of this trip. Unfortunately, the experience I received was completely different from what I expected and paid for.

I understand that hotels may face overbooking issues or large seminar groups, but the disappointing part was receiving a room that did not match what was booked — especially for guests who intentionally choose and pay more for the ocean view experience.

reviews.title: A beach respite in modern minimalist surroundings
reviews.text:
We selected this accommodation over others as we needed to be at the Maephim location. Within this vicinity, it is fair to say this is likely the better accommodation available. 
Close to the beach, there is a whole row of fresh seafood restaurants serving local favourites literally across the road.
Daily buffet breakfast is served at the Ocean Wing (so  accommodation is divided between the Garden Wing and the Ocean Wing). There is a shuttle that commutes between the 2 wings, about 400m away from each other (regular trips during b'fast times and every 30mins from each location). Because of the 2 locations, hotel guests have the luxury of using both the pools.
Staff are warm, welcoming and strive to be accommodating although language and exposure prevents them to excel.
There is a games room for children and a basic gym. In house food is tasty and made fresh to order, there is also an attractively priced happy hour.

A point to note for improvement is the inconsistency in water pressure in the rooms. We  stayed at the low rise Garden Wing rooms.

Parking was also a major inconvenience. In the evening, the parking area was completely full, and we were told to park at another branch about 500 meters away. For a guest traveling with a dog and a child, this was very inconvenient and not what I expected from a hotel of this level.

I hope the management can improve maintenance responsiveness, communication, and parking arrangements for future guests.

reviews.title: Good service overall, except for front desk staff
reviews.text:
Overall, it was a good experience.
Most of the staff were friendly and tried to help in many ways. Even though we checked in at 4 PM and the room wasn’t ready yet, we understood and didn’t mind at all.

However, the disappointing part was the receptionist named Beam.
He didn’t smile and had a visibly unpleasant expression when speaking to us during check-in. After we finished all the check-in steps—signing forms and providing details—my partner and I stood there for about 10 minutes without anyone saying anything. Eventually, my partner asked another female staff nearby if it was very busy, and only then she told us to please wait a bit and take a seat.

It was confusing and uncomfortable—Beam didn’t say a single word after taking our details, which made us unsure if there was an issue. That was really not okay.

That said, the rest of the staff were lovely—those at the water bar, the ones serving food, and the bell staff were all kind and attentive. We truly understand that the team must be tired during the busy holiday period, but we hope you can also consider things from the customer’s point of view—we’re also paying holiday rates and looking forward to a pleasant stay.

Thank you.

This time, though, we were so bummed that the pool was broken.  They said two days, but of course it was longer than that and we did not get to use it.  Don't feel it is right to have a place without a pool and still charge full price.  Also, this time, the staff was polite, but did not seem happy.  Almost as if they did not like working at the place.  Thai people are always wonderful, but there seemed to be a lack of easy smiles that you see at most places.   Have another upcoming reservation, but will likely switch it to another place in the area this time.

reviews.title: Un bel endroit pour un week-end prolongé à la mer en famille et avec votre chien

Dans la Ocean Side, on est au bord de la mer et la piscine est très belle. Le bar et le restaurant ont également une vue magnifique et on y mange bien. Bref, je recommande vivement cet hôtel.
reviews.negatives: Le samedi après-midi (heureusement que jusqu'à 18h) il y a un dj au bar de la piscine et la musique, bien que sympa, était vraiment trop forte. Même dans notre villa, on entendait encore les basses. Un peu moins fort aurait été mieux, mais heureusement ce n'est que le samedi! Sinon tout était parfait.

reviews.negatives:

Hunde bei Frühstück erlaubt. Croissant waren sehr schlecht, warscheinlich vom vortag oder aufgetaut. Alle Stoffsessel waren wirklich sehr sehr dreckig, wo ist der Manager? Sind alle Blind? Es ist sehr schade.
Strand war in Ordnung, aber keiner kontrolliert bzgl. Glasscherben. Sehr gefährlich für Kindern.

reviews.title: Enjoyable Stay, but Attention to Guest Experience Could Be Better
reviews.text: We stayed at the hotel for my birthday celebration and had a generally positive experience; however, the occasion was not acknowledged by the hotel staff. Unfortunately, we encountered a bathroom drainage issue that caused flooding while showering. Fortunately, the problem was resolved within a few minutes after we reported it. Despite this unexpected incident, there was no follow-up or acknowledgment from management, even at check-out, which was disappointing. While we enjoyed our stay, improved communication and attentiveness from the team would have enhanced the experience.

reviews.title: Hotel insgesamt gut, aber einige störende Umstände
reviews.positives: Frühstück war sehr gut, die Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter von Restaurant, Rezeption, Housekeeping, Security und Parkplatz waren alle super freundlich und hilfsbereit. Der Restaurantmanager war sehr aufmerksam. Der Garten war hervorragend gepflegt, unser Familienzimmer geräumig und sauber.
reviews.negatives: Zu viel Müll am Strand, sollte regelmäßig gereinigt werden. Tagelange Renovierungsarbeiten an den Holzbrettern rund um den Pool (Abschleifen und neues Streichen) war mit täglich stundenlangem Lärm und sehr viel Staubentwicklung verbunden. Der Staub legte sich auch auf das Wasser im Pool, das war extrem unangenehm. Es war einige Tage eigentlich nicht zumutbar, die Kinder in den Pool zu lassen. Es gab kein Angebot einer Kompensation vom Hotel, keine vorherigen Hinweise und auch keine Entschuldigung. Das war nicht schön, bei einem Hotel dieser Preiskategorie wäre mehr zu erwarten gewesen. Auch war das Kläffen einiger schlecht erzogener Hunde, die manche Gäste mitbrachten, immer wieder sehr störend, insbesondere am Pool. Wir hätten insgesamt gerne mehr Ruhe und Entspannung gehabt. Das nächste Mal würden wir wohl ein Hotel mit schönerem Strand und ohne Haustiere vorziehen.

Also, it felt like the system among the pool bar and restaurant staff didn't really have good teamwork. It took almost 2 hours to get new towels for the pool, and all they kept saying was "It's coming." The food overall wasn't bad. Plus, the restaurant was open late, which was good for having a late dinner.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is beautiful, with two wings: the ocean wing and the garden wing. If you're into taking content, I recommend going to the ocean wing. You can change outfits multiple times after taking photos; just step outside for sea pictures. However, if you prefer to relax, the garden wing is fine since it's less crowded. It has a large swimming pool, and during busy times, it won’t feel as cramped as the other side because the hotel is spacious. There are shuttle cars to each wing every half hour, which are the hotel’s vans/pickup trucks. Regarding cleanliness, I think there’s still some room for improvement because the towels and bath towels had stains. I don’t know how the supervisor approved that, as when we stayed at another hotel in the same tier, they were much cleaner. As for the staff, I think they lack a bit of service mind. For example, we had a lot of luggage, and no one asked if we needed help, even though there were many people around the reception. In another hotel chain, the staff constantly asked if we needed assistance. I really hope they can improve the service mindset of the staff here because when checking out, no one asked about our stay or if we slept well. Don’t you want feedback to improve? 😅

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Schöne Hotelanlage. Zimmer im Hochhaus mit Meeresblick war super. Frühstücksbuffet vielfältog und gut mit sehr freundlichem und aufmerksamem Personal. Shuttle Service zum Frühstück im Ostwing funktioniert gut. Man musste kaum warten. Vom Roof Top hat man nochmals einen besonderen Blick, der Sonnenuntergang von oben ist faszinierend.
reviews.negatives:
Das Personal in der Roff Top Bar ist freundlich, könnte aber öfter nach den Gästen sehen und fragen, ob noch etwas bestellt werden möchte. Tische werden nach dem Essen nicht abgeräumt. Es stört dann die Atmosphäre. Die Musik haben wir als zu laut empfunden.

Im Außenbereich des Ostwing ist das Restaurant (Écume) sehr schön, aber die Polster bei den Couch Möbeln sind mit (älteren) Flecken beschmutzt, teilweise vielen. Es ist unhygienisch, gerade wenn man dort auch speisen möchte.

reviews.title: Aufgepasst beim online buchen!
reviews.positives: Das Hotel ist quasi „zweigeteilt“. Wir waren der Meinung wir hätten dort gebucht wo auf der Buchungsplattform die schönen Bilder vom Pool etc, direkt am Strand, ersichtlich sind. Tatsächlich haben wir in einem grossen (neuerstellten) Komplex gebucht, welcher mehrere 100 Meter vom gemeinten Standort entfernt liegt - und dies nicht direkt am Meer! Wir konnten dann glücklicherweise umbuchen und das tolle Hotel geniessen. Alles perfekt hier. Die Lage, die Zimmer (wir hatten eine Villa), die Sauberkeit, die Freundlichkeit und Hilfsbereitschaft der Mitarbeiter, das Frühstück und und und alles vom Feinsten.
reviews.negatives: Es werden hier in einer speziellen Abteilung Zimmer an Gäste abgegeben, welche mit ihren Haustieren reisen. Insbesondere sind es Hunde aller Rassen. Diese machen es sich teilweise auch gemütlich auf den gepolsterten Liegen am Pool etc. Naja, wer’s mag.. Dieses Angebot passt irgendwie überhaupt nicht zu diesem tollen Hotel.

reviews.title: I like it, but I don't like the way the hotel provides information to customers.
reviews.text: This hotel is divided into two sections: the Garden Wing and the Glacial Wing, which are more than half a kilometer apart. They shouldn't even be called the same hotel and should really have separate names. Although there is a shuttle van service, you can still use the other location. However, the experience of walking out and finding the sea right there is completely different from having to walk down, take a shuttle van, and then drive for a while to reach the sea. It's a totally different vibe. But I really liked the breakfast; it was very good. I highly recommend it and you shouldn’t miss it for any reason.

reviews.negatives:
De begeleiding om het hotel te verlaten was pover.... Het inchecken was ook niet zo duidelijk waar ik moest zijn.   Bij het uitchecken geen hulp meer met de bagage, beetje aan mijn lot overgelaten... 
In deze omgeving zeer weinig taxi's beschikbaar.  Wel enkele fijne en lekkere visrestaurants, op wandelafstand van het hotel (max 10 min wandelen)

when booking the rooms i wanted, I selected the Garden view, Not knowing that this is now a completely seperate building, this is not clearly highlighted on Agoda. saying that, transport was layed on to transfer between resorts, but we had a car anyway. just a bit annoying having to drive to get breakfast. all in all, the new Garden wing is very nice, very clean and a lovely pool. would definitely recommend, but check what building you are in.

reviews.text:
The room is quite impressive. It is spacious, new, beautifully decorated, and looks clean and tidy. Especially the bed, which is of very good quality; it is comfortable and supports the body well. I woke up without feeling any aches. This is definitely a highlight of this place.

However, there are a few minor complaints regarding the water system in the shower. The water flow is quite weak and it stops intermittently, making it not very consistent to use. The breakfast is well arranged, but the taste is not particularly outstanding.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
We had an amazing vacation and truly enjoyed our stay. We stayed in the ocean wing with beautiful ocean and pool views, along with a very spacious balcony that made the experience even more special.

The kids had a fantastic time in the pool, while we relaxed and enjoyed the stunning scenery. Breakfast was great, and what stood out the most was the staff — everyone was incredibly kind, respectful, and helpful. The service was also very fast whenever we needed assistance.

Highly recommended! We will definitely come back again for our next holiday.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The hotel has 2 zones, ocean wing and garden wing, which are located 400 meters apart in different areas. For those staying in the garden wing, there is a shuttle service available, but in the promotional images, it seems that both zones of the hotel are in the same area, which may not be very convenient for people staying in the garden wing who want to take a leisurely walk to use the seaside facilities shown in the promotional images (I would deduct points here because when we stayed, the ocean view rooms were fully booked, and we thought that staying in the garden view would be fine and we could walk to the beach). Overall, it is considered good; the hotel is new and beautiful, pet-friendly, and the food and coffee are reasonably priced (the cafe and coffee shop in the hotel are located in the garden zone). The staff is lovely, offers good service, and is cheerful.

reviews.title: Beautiful view, good breakfast, and a fairly extensive food line.
reviews.text: The room is not too small or too big, just right. The bed is soft and comfortable, and it is clean. However, if you stay in a building, you shouldn't stay on the lower floors because you can hear the footsteps from the upper floors. The air conditioning turns off frequently; the front desk informs that it will turn off if the balcony door is left open, but even if you don't leave it open, it still turns off frequently. Overall, it is good, and the price is reasonable. It is not suitable for people who do not like pets and those who prefer complete peace and quiet, as this hotel accommodates families with young children and pets, which can be a bit noisy. The staff at the bar is few and does not provide thorough service.

ถ้ามีโอกาสก็อาจจะไปอีก เพราะใกล้ๆกรุงเทพและน้องหมาไปได้

reviews.text: We stayed here for 5 nights and thoroughly enjoyed the great seaside location. Small enough to remain personal and never crowded at the pool. The breakfast was superb, offering a great selection of tasty western and Thai food. This was enough for us to skip lunch. Restaurant food is good for dinner, but there are also plenty of sea food restaurants with walking distance along the beach. Come during the week when it feels like you have the place to yourselves.

reviews.text:
We’re stayed 2 nights in Executive room without terrace.
Executive room is tiny and clean but the shower room and toilet too small. 
The pool is only 1.2m. deep and not large. We added breakfast for 2 pax, which is so-so and basics buffet bf severed. 
The outdoor parking lot is limited.
 The restaurant menu for lunch and dinner was not much choice, no seafoods grilled during my stay. There will be buffet on Saturday only.
However most of staff members are quite friendly and great service.

reviews.title: Nice place. No issues.
reviews.text:
On a couples holiday,  enjoyed it quite a bit.  Atmosphere and environment were quite nice.  Please realize it's a hotel that allows pets thus everything involving pets should be considered e.g. occasional poop on the beach, barking,  and wandering pets.

Restaurant is of good quality, better than is offered by the local seafood restaurants. Service staff did a great job.

Only possible issues in terms of negatives is some of the lesser or unused facilities are neglected and look worn down or unsightly. 

Overall an enjoyable experience and will be visiting again,  with my dog next time.

reviews.title: Everything is good, but...
reviews.text:
The hotel is very beautiful, overall it's great. 
Pros:
- The hotel is very beautiful, perfect for staying without going anywhere. 
- The bed is really good, very comfortable to sleep in. 
- The bathroom is very spacious, the lighting is nice, I really like the lights at the counter. 
- The room is photogenic from every angle.
Cons:
- I came alone, it's very hard to call a Bolt or Grab, in the end, I had to take a shared taxi.
- Upon arrival, the room was ready at 15:30, I understand, but I just want to complain a little bit.
- I booked the wrong zone and later realized that I was supposed to be on the beach side, but I had to take a taxi to get there. However, the hotel does offer transportation services.

reviews.title: A nearly perfect weekend escape
reviews.text:
A really good, new hotel that has a few quirks. Understaffed pool area; leftovers should be cleaned promptly and the pool should be cleaner. Room is missing a few things; outdoor drying rack, dressing gown, and flip flops.

I’d definitely take this over the other hotels in the area though, smaller but more cozy than the Novotel.

reviews.title: Ocean View Executive Suite with Plunge Pool
reviews.text: When booking, it was another room but upgraded to the Sea Breeze Executive Suite with Ocean View and Plunge Pool. The room is spacious with a small pool for kids to play in, but the door to the house near the pool cannot be locked (forgot to inform the staff). The service staff were very friendly and smiled. When we went, we couldn't use the big pool as it was only available until 4 PM because of a wedding event. We had planned to relax in the pool in the evening, but it's okay as the hotel provided a bar drink voucher, which was nice. Overall, it was good, quiet, and private. The kids enjoyed it too.

reviews.title: Recharge during road-trip
reviews.text: We stayed there for one night on our road-trip along the coast. The resort is located quite far away from cities, so best is to have your own transport. Room was spacious and clean. We enjoyed staying there and to refresh in the pool before heading further. Can't imagine staying only at the resort for longer because of the limited activities in the area. If you are just looking for a quiet place to relax then go there. The restaurant offers a breakfast buffet.

Would stay here again.
